HOME.NAME: DANIEL
HOME.DESCRIPTION_1: Full-Stack Developer specializing in Python, with experience in Angular and Node.js. Skilled in relational databases such as MySQL and NoSQL databases including MongoDB and Firebase. Experienced in deploying applications on Railway, Vercel, and Render.

PROJECTS.TITLE: My projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Some projects I've built — for university and personal work.

ITEMS.LA_MORADA_BACK_DESC: Backend developed for the Clínica La Morada web platform. It provides a RESTful API for managing patients, medical appointments, user authentication, and clinical data administration. Includes data validation, role-based access control, and secure database integration. Node.js v18.x
ITEMS.QUORIDOR_DESC: Implementation of the board game Quoridor developed in Python. The project includes full game logic, move validation, official rules enforcement, and turn management. Designed with a strong focus on data structures and algorithms for efficient board handling. Python 3.10
ITEMS.AXIS_BACK_DESC: Backend for the Axis Authenticator system. Provides authentication and authorization services, token generation and validation, and user management features. Designed with a modular architecture to ensure scalability and maintainability. Node.js v18.x
ITEMS.EAC_DESC: System developed in Python for managing an emergency attention center. It allows patient registration, priority classification (triage), management of service times, and organization of medical resources. Focused on simulation and optimization of hospital processes. Python 3.9
ITEMS.AXIS_AUTH_DESC: Mobile application developed as the client for the Axis Authenticator system. Enables secure user authentication, two-factor verification, and credential management. Designed with a strong focus on security and user experience. Dart 3.x / Flutter 3.x
ITEMS.LA_MORADA_DESC: Web application developed for Clínica La Morada. Allows users to browse medical services, schedule appointments, and access institutional information. Implements a modern frontend architecture with API integration and responsive design. Angular 16

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.P1: I'm a student and FullStack developer with over 1 year of experience focused on backend. I enjoy working on both frontend and backend, and I'm always learning to improve my skills and build fast and efficient applications.
ABOUT.P2: I'm interested in turning ideas into real solutions, working with best practices, version control, and cloud deployments. I like building projects with scalable and maintainable code.

BLOG.DESC: On my blog I share my learning process and my journey in the tech world.

CARD_1.TITLE: University 2026
CARD_1.BODY: I'm currently in my eighth semester at Universidad de Medellín and I'll soon start an internship. I'm continuing my training as a systems engineer.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact me
CONTACT.P1: Interested in working with me? I'm available for job opportunities, freelance projects, or collaborations. Message me!
CONTACT.P2: I'm interested in turning ideas into real solutions, working with best practices, version control, and cloud deployments.
